elements.value: FAMILIES, CHILDREN, PREGNANCY OR FAMILY PLANNING-AWARDED-20250116-PLEASE NOTE THAT AWARDED STATUS DOES NOT MEAN EVERY MEMBER IN THE HOUSEHOLD HAS AL MEDICAID COVERAGE
Effective 10/01/2022, adults 21 and older covered for Dental Care while pregnant and 2 months after end of pregnancy for service type(s);35
Paid Dental Full or Panoramic Xray
